name: Tor
description: Control the Tor network from Quick Settings: one-click on/off (per-user tor via systemd --user, zero sudo), exit-country picker, live bootstrap progress, New Identity, obfs4 bridges, circuit viewer, and tap-to-copy SOCKS5 endpoint. Talks to tor's ControlPort directly for runtime config. Ships with scripts/install-user-tor.sh for initial $HOME-scoped setup.
